instruction:
Let $a_1,a_2,\ldots,a_6$ be a sequence of integers such that for all $1 \le i \le 5$ ,
$$$a_{i+1}=\frac{a_i}{3} \quad \text{or} \quad a_{i+1}={-}2a_i.$$$
Find the number of possible positive values of $a_1+a_2+\cdots+a_6$ less than $1000$ .

Options:
A. 141
B. 145
C. 142
D. 147
E. 149
F. 148
G. 140
H. 146
I. 143
J. 144
